definitions.text: The front part of the leg below the knee; the front edge of the shin bone: Shinbone on Wikipedia.Wikipedia
examples: Soccer players have to wear protective gear so they don't injure their shins.

definitions.text: To climb up or lower oneself down a mast, tree, rope, or the like, by embracing it alternately with the arms and legs, without help of steps, spurs, or the like.
To run about borrowing money hastily and temporarily, as when trying to make a payment.
The twenty-first letter of many Semitic alphabets/abjads (Phoenician, Aramaic, Hebrew, Syriac, Arabic and others): Shin (letter) on Wikipedia.Wikipedia
